title: toona hexandra subsp. velutina
intro: Toona hexandra subsp. velutina, also known as the Himalayan cedar or Chinese toona, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Meliaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties, making it a popular remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Toona hexandra subsp. velutina include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and promoting wound healing. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
